title: Enforcement of penalties by civil proceedings
doc_html:
§558.  Enforcement of penalties by civil proceedings

All penalties provided in this Sub-part shall be enforced against corporations by civil proceedings instituted by the proper enforcement officers of this state.
doc_text:
§558.  Enforcement of penalties by civil proceedings
All penalties provided in this Sub-part shall be enforced against corporations by civil proceedings instituted by the proper enforcement officers of this state.
